name: How much is my workplace hearing loss case worth?
description: $20K+ based on audiogram % loss and state schedules.[1]

mainEntity.name: How much is my workplace hearing loss case worth?

acceptedAnswer.text: $20K+ based on audiogram % loss and state schedules.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Value depends on impairment rating (5-50%+), lost wages, and medical costs; averages $20K-$100K+ for moderate bilateral loss.** PPI pays per percentage via state schedules; Utah/Idaho factor age and binaural loss.[1][2] Add TTD if off work, future care. Expert ratings determine amounts; lawyers negotiate higher. Document all impacts.
